title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAUGUEN, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO SALCEDO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 157 / 53 OG No. 14, 4430 (July 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1627, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAUGUEN, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO SALCEDO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Bauguen, province of Ilocos Sur, is hereby changed to Salcedo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
